Title: User successfully signs up and logs in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter valid user information
3. Submit the form
4. Verify that the user is redirected to the login page
5. Log in with the same credentials
6. Verify that the user is logged in successfully
Expected Result: User is successfully signed up and logged in

Title: User tries to sign up with an existing username
Preconditions: User with the same username already exists
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the sign-up page
2. Enter the existing username, valid password, and email
3. Submit the form
4. Verify that an error message is displayed
Expected Result: Error message indicating that the username is already taken

Title: User successfully logs in
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter valid username and password
3. Submit the form
4. Verify that the user is logged in successfully

Title: User tries to log in with incorrect credentials
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page
2. Enter invalid username and valid password
3. Submit the form
4. Verify that an error message is displayed
Expected Result: Error message indicating incorrect username or password

Title: User creates a new announcement
Test Data: Valid announcement details (title, description, location, price)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create announcement page
2. Enter valid announcement details
3. Submit the form
4. Verify that the announcement is created successfully

Title: User tries to create an announcement with invalid details
Test Data: Invalid announcement details (empty title, invalid price)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the create announcement page
2. Enter invalid announcement details
3. Submit the form
4. Verify that an error message is displayed
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid announcement details

Title: User filters announcements by location
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are announcements in the system
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcements page
2. Select the valid location filter
3. Apply the filter
4. Verify that only announcements matching the selected location are displayed
Expected Result: Only announcements matching the selected location are displayed

Title: User applies an invalid filter
Preconditions: User is logged in and there are announcements in the system
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcements page
2. Select the invalid location filter
3. Apply the filter
4. Verify that an error message is displayed

Title: User modifies an existing announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is an existing announcement
Test Data: Updated announcement details (title, description, location, price)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement details page
2. Edit the announcement details
3. Save the changes
4. Verify that the announcement is updated successfully

Title: User tries to modify an announcement with invalid details
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is an existing announcement
Test Data: Invalid announcement details (empty title, invalid price)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement details page
2. Enter invalid announcement details
3. Save the changes
4. Verify that an error message is displayed
Expected Result: Error message indicating invalid announcement details

Title: User books an announcement
Preconditions: User is logged in, announcement is available for booking
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the announcement details page
2. Click the booking button
3. Enter valid booking details
4. Submit the booking form
5. Verify that the booking is successful
